testcase.name: ConfirmationView > renders all required confirmation data after successful registration
ConfirmationView > renders pickup address block when pickup data is present
layout and legal views > renders header with logo, title and global navigation links
layout and legal views > renders footer with legal hints and links
layout and legal views > renders imprint page content
layout and legal views > renders privacy page content
quality attribute coverage > uses responsive layout and overflow-safe styling for core views
quality attribute coverage > keeps interactive controls keyboard-accessible through semantic elements and focus styles
quality attribute coverage > uses a standard Vue and Vite setup for broad modern-browser delivery
quality attribute coverage > builds production assets within a conservative bundle-size budget
RegistrationForm component flow > shows only delivery selection initially
RegistrationForm component flow > shows donation fields immediately for office handover
RegistrationForm component flow > highlights visible required fields before user completes them
RegistrationForm component flow > requires valid pickup address before showing donation fields for pickup
RegistrationForm component flow > shows pending highlight on pickup address inputs before completion
RegistrationForm component flow > shows validation errors on submit when required fields are missing
RegistrationForm component flow > shows and clears select field validation errors after correction
RegistrationForm component flow > shows and clears pickup postal validation error after correction
RegistrationForm component flow > resets pickup address values when switching from pickup to office and back
RegistrationForm component flow > submits office flow successfully and navigates to confirmation
RegistrationForm component flow > submits pickup flow successfully after address gate and saves normalized data
formLogic > normalizes input values robustly
formLogic > returns the first two postal code digits
formLogic > validates postal code format with boundary cases
formLogic > detects pickup postal code inside the office area
formLogic > detects whether pickup address is complete including whitespace-only inputs
formLogic > allows donation details immediately for office handover
formLogic > blocks donation details for pickup until address is complete and postal code valid
formLogic > validates office form successfully without pickup address
formLogic > accepts valid pickup form including matching postal prefix
formLogic > returns required-field errors for empty form
formLogic > validates pickup address fields and postal code format
formLogic > treats whitespace-only pickup address inputs as missing
formLogic > rejects pickup postal code outside the office area with explanation
formLogic > prioritizes postal format error before area check
formLogic > trims pickup postal code before validation and area check
formLogic > builds confirmation payload for office handover
formLogic > builds confirmation payload for pickup with normalized address
formLogic > builds localized timestamp fields for payload
